name: Robotics Expo — Invente 2026
description:
Showcase of student-built robots, live demos and an open robo-soccer match.

Highlights this year:
• Autonomous maze-solving bots
• Line-follower sprint challenge
• Open robo-soccer tournament (register at the door)
• Q&A session with faculty mentors

Open to all visiting colleges. No prior registration needed for spectators.

name: 24-Hour Hackathon — Invente 2026
description:
Overnight build challenge for teams of up to 4. Push your limits, ship something real, and compete for prizes worth ₹1,00,000+.

Theme revealed at kickoff.

Rules:
• Teams of 2–4 participants
• Any tech stack, any platform
• Code must be written during the event
• Final demos at 8:00 AM on Day 2

Registration desk at CSE Block entrance. Refreshments provided throughout the night.
organizer: Dept. of CSE, SSN College of Engineering

name: Battle of Bands — Instincts 2026
description:
Inter-college band competition — the main highlight event of SSN's cultural fest.

Featuring:
• 8 college bands competing for the title
• Genres: Rock, Indie, Jazz, Fusion
• Celebrity guest performance after finals
• Prize pool: ₹75,000

Seating is free and open to all. Doors open at 17:30. Don't miss the opening act at 18:15!

name: F1
description: REGISTRATION CAN BE DONE AT THE VENUE
